name: Evolution (Rebirth)
reward: Alien Investors (+1% cash per investor permanently)
note: In-game calls it 'Evolution'. Fast prestige reset. Wait for 350%+ investor bonus sweet spot before evolving.

name: Ascension
reward: 7.77× cash boost, 3.33× higher prices, leaderboard spot
note: Rare macro reset. Loses Cosmic Vine and void evolution progress. Gets Ascension Halo cosmetic.
